slashCommands.name: comment
slashCommands.description: Write comments for the selected code

customCommands.name: test
customCommands.prompt:
{{{ input }}}

Write a comprehensive test suite for the above code using the project's testing framework. Include edge cases and error scenarios.

customCommands.name: refactor
customCommands.prompt:
{{{ input }}}

Refactor the above code to improve readability, maintainability, and performance. Explain your changes.

customCommands.name: docs
customCommands.prompt:
{{{ input }}}

Write comprehensive documentation for the above code, including docstrings, inline comments, and usage examples.

customCommands.name: review
customCommands.prompt:
{{{ input }}}

Perform a thorough code review of the above code. Identify bugs, security issues, performance problems, and suggest improvements.

customCommands.name: explain
customCommands.prompt:
{{{ input }}}

Explain what the above code does in detail, including the purpose, logic flow, and any complex algorithms or patterns used.

quickActions.title: Quick Fix

quickActions.title: Optimize
quickActions.prompt: Optimize the selected code for performance

quickActions.title: Simplify
